ddls:
CREATE TABLE "prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the prize was awarded */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the prize (e.g., Physics, Chemistry, Peace) */,
  "prize_name" TEXT /* Full name of the prize */,
  "motivation" TEXT /* Motivation for the prize */,
  "prize_share" TEXT /* Share of the prize (e.g., 1/1, 1/4) */,
  "prize_type" TEXT /* Type of prize (Individual or Organization) */,
  "prize_amount" TEXT /* Monetary value of the prize */,
  "prize_awarded_date" TEXT /* Exact date when the prize was awarded */,
  "prize_announcement_date" TEXT /* Date when the prize was announced */,
  "prize_ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the prize ceremony */,
  "prize_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the prize medal or certificate */,
  "prize_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video of the prize ceremony or announcement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prizes_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES decades ("decade_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prizes_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureates" (
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laureate */,
  "laureate_type" TEXT /* Type of laureate (Individual or Organization) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the laureate */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "birth_city" TEXT /* City of birth */,
  "birth_country" TEXT /* Country of birth */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death */,
  "death_city" TEXT /* City of death */,
  "death_country" TEXT /* Country of death */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the laureate */,
  "usa_born_winner" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the laureate is USA-born */,
  "female_winner" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the laureate is female */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the laureate */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the laureate */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the laureate's personal or professional website */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the laureate */,
  "research_field" TEXT /* Primary research field of the laureate */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Other awards and honors received by the laureate */,
  "publications" TEXT /* Key publications of the laureate */,
  "citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the laureate's work */,
  "impact_factor" TEXT /* Impact factor of the laureate's work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "organization_city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "organization_country" TEXT /* Country where the organization is located */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the organization's website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the organization */,
  "annual_budget" TEXT /* Annual budget of the organization */,
  "key_projects" TEXT /* Key projects or initiatives of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureate_prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "laureate_type" TEXT /* Type of laureate (Individual or Organization) */,
  "prize_share" TEXT /* Share of the prize (e.g., 1/1, 1/4) */,
  "acceptance_speech_url" TEXT /* URL to the laureate's acceptance speech */,
  "prize_ceremony_location" TEXT /* Location of the prize ceremony */,
  "prize_ceremony_attendees" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the prize ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id", "laureate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureate_organizations" (
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the laureate started association with the organization */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the laureate ended association with the organization */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the laureate in the organization */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Key responsibilities in the organization */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements while associated with the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_id", "organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Physics, Chemistry, Peace) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "category_video_url" TEXT /* URL to a video explaining the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decades" (
  "decade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decade */,
  "decade_name" TEXT /* Name of the decade (e.g., 1900, 1910) */,
  "total_prizes" INTEGER /* Total number of prizes awarded in the decade */,
  "total_laureates" INTEGER /* Total number of laureates in the decade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_decades" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize */,
  "decade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the decade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id", "decade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table accessed */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the row accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
